headline: Cboe Global (Nasdaq:Cboe) Introduces a New Prediction Markets Framework
summary: Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:CBOE) is one of the 15 Set-It-and-Forget-It Stocks to Buy in 2026. On March 9, 2026, Cboe Global Markets, Inc. (NASDAQ:CBOE) introduced a new prediction markets framework that moves beyond traditional contracts with two binary outcomes: “yes or no,” “all or nothing.” The model anticipates a launch in the second quarter […]
